# ITagFilterBuilder&lt;TFilter&gt;.TagTypeIn method

Returns a *TFilter* that only includes tags whose type is contained in a set of tag types.

```csharp
public TFilter TagTypeIn(params Type[] tagTypes)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| tagTypes | The tag types. |

## Return Value

A *TFilter* that only includes tags whose type is contained in *tagTypes*.
